text:
>>Number:         4931
>>Category:       misc
>>Synopsis:       Keyboard lockup during floppy install
>>Confidential:   no
>>Severity:       serious
>>Priority:       high
>>Responsible:    freebsd-bugs
>>State:          open
>>Class:          support
>>Submitter-Id:   current-users
>>Arrival-Date:   Mon Nov  3 20:20:00 PST 1997
>>Last-Modified:
>>Originator:     mike perkins
>>Organization:
>Dragon Productions
>>Release:        dont know...  the earliest one on FTP server

It is CRITICALLY important to supply this information to diagnose your
problem.

BTW: Do you mean _oldest_ by "earliest"? Which FTP server did you use?

>>Description:
>When I go to install from a floppy disk onto my hard drive... it locks
>up!

Please describe the symptom as much as you can. What action did you
take?  What happened then? At which point did the system lock up?

>I tried to get a keyboard installed... but one doesnt exist!?
>(in the kernel)

The keyboard/console driver is built-in by default. You don't need
to INSTALL it. What did you try to do and what exactly did you do?

>how can I get this fixed?
>>How-To-Repeat:
>come over to my house!
>dont know...
